revision.comment: More vandalism to sensitive categories.
1 revision imported
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (3 members)
Bot: convert empty category to redirect
revision.text: #redirect [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:redirect categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "#redirect" to ""

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

revision.comment: Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q7045918}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles needing additional references]] [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

<!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q7045918}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles needing additional references]] [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q7045918}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles needing additional references]] [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q7045918}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles needing additional references]] [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:articles with]]
